privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world time-series data from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset, specifically the realAWSCloudwatch subset. The CPU utilization metric ('servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization') is populated using the real EC2 CPU data file 'ec2_cpu_utilization_5f5533.csv', and the disk write metric ('servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes') uses the real EC2 disk data file 'ec2_disk_write_bytes_1ef3de.csv'. The underlying data used for the Graphite dashboard graphs is not synthetic.
